## Mathematical Target

State the focused definition, theorem, or proof task.

## Source

Give a literature reference with a precise locator and link any relevant
blueprint node.

## Lean Surface

Identify the likely module, existing declarations, and expected dependencies.

## Completion Criteria

Describe the smallest reviewable contribution that would resolve the issue.

## Notes

Use Discussions instead when the proposal requires a broad redesign.
